name: lightbox2
author: Lokesh Dhakar <lokesh.dhakar@gmail.com>
description: The original Lightbox script. Uses jQuery.

scripts.build: npm run lint && npm run build:copy && npm run build:concat && npm run build:uglify && npm run build:cssmin
scripts.build:copy: mkdir -p dist/js dist/css dist/images && cp src/js/* dist/js/ && cp src/css/* dist/css/ && cp src/images/* dist/images/
scripts.build:uglify: uglifyjs src/js/lightbox.js -o dist/js/lightbox.min.js --source-map && uglifyjs dist/js/lightbox-plus-jquery.js -o dist/js/lightbox-plus-jquery.min.js --source-map
